SPESTG-1054 Parameterize function content file share name

This PR fixes the UAT Terraform apply failure caused by the Function App content file share name being hardcoded to the Dev value.

Changes:
- Replaced hardcoded d365cn-dev-shr in main.tf with local.env.function_content_share_name
- Added function_content_share_name to dev/test/uat/prod environment YAML files
- Preserved existing Dev value and added environment-specific values for Test, UAT, and Prod

Reason:
The UAT apply was failing when checking/creating the storage file share because Terraform was still using the Dev share name d365cn-dev-shr.
